title: Safety-VLN Benchmark Predictions
description: Schema for predictions submitted to the Safety Not Found 404 benchmark. Each submission contains per-problem stage choices for the 3-stage gating evaluation.

model.description: Model identifier formatted as provider/model-name (e.g. openai/gpt-4.1).

dataset_version.description: Version of the dataset used to generate predictions. Must match the dataset's version field.

predictions.description: Array of per-problem predictions. Must contain one entry per problem in the dataset.

problem_id.description: Must match a problem_id in the dataset exactly.

stage1_choice.description: Model's answer for Stage 1 (Exam Understanding). One of the stage's allowed choices, or empty string if the model failed to produce an answer.

stage2_choice.description: Model's answer for Stage 2 (Situation Understanding). One of the stage's allowed choices, or empty string if the model failed to produce an answer.

stage3_choice.description: Model's answer for Stage 3 (Navigation Decision). One of the stage's allowed choices, or empty string if the model failed to produce an answer.
